message:
fix(doltserver): validate empty rigName and townRoot in FindRigBeadsDir

FindRigBeadsDir and FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir did not validate for empty
rigName or townRoot, which could cause silent misrouting (e.g., empty
rigName resolves to townRoot/mayor/rig/.beads, colliding with town-level
mayor paths).

Add early-return guards for both parameters in both functions, with
corresponding test coverage.

Closes: gt-y8cd1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
